properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.frontend-base-url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used to construct links.

properties.name: app.mail.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable outbound application emails.

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: From address used for outbound application emails.

properties.name: spring.flyway.url
properties.description: Flyway JDBC URL used by database migration runner.

properties.name: spring.flyway.user
properties.description: Flyway database username used by database migration runner.

properties.name: spring.flyway.password
properties.description: Flyway database password used by database migration runner.

properties.name: spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate
properties.description: Whether to baseline an existing schema before migrate.
